posts.text:
On the show today:

Two radical Muslims attack two targets on the same day – just the latest terror attack in a wave of them on American soil;

we talk about what can be done; and we ask whether America has the will to outlast Iran’s terrorist regime?

Watch here: piped.video/watch?v=dBewatbI…
